title: TLA+ prompt language experiment for the distributed retrieval contract

generation_target.summary: Generate the distributed retrieval contract slice that preserves the original question, fans out across all active agents, merges results deterministically, and surfaces shard failures explicitly.
deliverables: Preserve the original question end-to-end through distributed retrieval.
Dispatch retrieval across all active agents participating in the request.
Merge results deterministically instead of depending on arrival order.
Surface shard failures explicitly with no silent local-only fallback.
Provide focused tests that enforce the retrieval contract.
non_goals: Do not build a full greenfield distributed hive implementation.
Do not widen scope into Azure deployment or transport-layer work.
Do not depend on changes in amplihack-agent-eval for this first slice.
Do not add new grading dimensions to the authoritative eval harness in this repo.

prompt_variants.label: Hybrid TLA+ plus English guidance prompt

fairness_rules: All variants target the same distributed retrieval contract slice.
The hybrid prompt may add implementation guidance but must not expand the required deliverables.
Prompt reviewers should compare deliverables and non-goals before any full-matrix run.
ownership_notes: This repo owns the experiment assets, manifest, and first-slice utilities.
Authoritative harness and packaged report changes still belong in amplihack-agent-eval.
